product_description: an AI-powered marketing intelligence platform that helps growth teams optimize campaign performance and reduce wasted ad spend

product_metadata.pricing: Plans start at $799 per month. Teams spending over $50K/month on ads typically see full ROI within 30 days.
product_metadata.avg_waste_reduction: Teams recover an average of 15-30% of wasted ad spend within the first 60 days.
product_metadata.setup_time: Connects to Google, Meta, and LinkedIn in under 48 hours with no downtime.
product_metadata.case_study: A B2B SaaS team running $120K/month across three channels cut their cost-per-lead by 28% in the first month by eliminating audience overlap between retargeting and prospecting campaigns.

opening: Hi {prospect_name}, this is Maya calling from PulseIQ. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick—I'm calling because we help marketing teams like yours find hidden inefficiencies in their ad spend that individual platform dashboards miss. Do you have a quick minute?
value_propositions: We help teams recover 15-30% of wasted ad spend within the first 60 days by identifying budget leaks across channels that you can't see in Google or Meta alone
Instead of toggling between multiple dashboards, you get one unified view of all your campaigns—so your team spends less time reporting and more time optimizing
We show you exactly where audience overlap and underperforming segments are draining your budget, so you can fix it immediately

objection_handlers.price: I get it—budget matters. Here's the thing: teams spending $50K+ per month typically recoup the platform cost within 30 days through better campaign decisions. How much are you currently spending across ads?
objection_handlers.not_interested: Fair enough. Quick question though—are you currently using multiple platforms to run your campaigns? If you are, there's a good chance you're leaving optimization on the table.
objection_handlers.already_have_solution: Makes sense. Most teams use Google Analytics or platform dashboards, but they only show you half the picture. What we do is find the cross-channel inefficiencies that those tools miss. Worth a 15-minute look?
objection_handlers.no_time: Totally understand. How about this—let me send you a two-minute breakdown of how a team like yours recovered 28% of their ad spend in the first month. Does that work?
objection_handlers.need_approval: Absolutely, that's smart. I can send you a summary and some specific numbers from similar teams. What's the best way to get that in front of them—email or would you prefer I hop on a brief call with both of you?
objection_handlers.data_privacy: Great question. We're compliant with all relevant regulations, and we never touch your actual campaign data—we only analyze performance metrics to find optimization opportunities.

closing: Does it make sense to spend 15 minutes next week so I can show you exactly where your ad spend is being wasted?
